notes: First off, when I alt-tabbed out of the game I could not get back in. Second I ran the game on the high preset and lastly, I raced round Spa for three laps with Esync disabled and then another time with it enabled. When it was enabled the menus were very smooth and the game loaded quickly, however, when I got into the race the framerate was poor and there were many drops it was the complete opposite for when it is disabled.
title: F1 2018

notes: Solo is running perfectly. Not tested Multiplayer. Peripherals are recognized
title: F1 2018

notes: Realizado testes apenas no modo Grande Premium, funcionando perfeitamente. Sem nenhum ajuste adicional. Rodando em 60 FPS. Att Campacci.
title: F1 2018

notes: Little stuttering from time to time and some freeze on the first moment on a track but after that it's almost flawless except issue with force feedback missing with my G27 (the game don't even recognize it)
title: F1 2018

notes: The game works well, but my logitech wheel (Logitech g29) is not recognized, so the game is playable, but without the most important controller. This game is not intended for use with keyboard...
title: F1 2018

notes:
Tweaks: Disable particles
Runs smoothly, but only with keyboard. Doesn't recognize my logitech f510 and f710 controllers, while they work fine on f1 2017. Sad because thats the only thing that's not working and a racing game with keyboard is almost unplayable which is a shame and hopefully it will get fixed. Fps always above 60-100.
title: F1 2018

notes: Works smooth without any tweaks. Multiplayer not tested.
title: F1 2018

notes: Performance is comparable to Windows, but it crashes when trying to tab out and in again. PlayStation DualShock 4 Controller is detected as XBox controller which results in bad calibration and weird rumble behaviour. Thus the gameplay mechanics relying on rumble are not usable for the player.
title: F1 2018

notes: No tweaks necessary. Runs with almost no stutters on medium settings.
title: F1 2018

notes: Performance are great, force feedback is working with my g29, Multiplayer not tested

notes:
Funciona bien, hasta que termino la primera carrera.

title: F1 2018

notes: Did not apply any tweaks! Benchmark @ 2560x1440 59fps in average, which is very playable. I ran the test on three different courses and the results are very similiar. On one track my average fps dropped to 58.
title: F1 2018

notes: Played the game in Time Trial for several hours. Initially, the resolution was incorrectly detect and had to manually change to match resolution of monitor. Did not experience any graphical glitches, fps dips, crashes, or other issues. Logitech G29 (including pedals and buttons) is detected without applying tweak; however, Force Feedback does not work. No known work around to enable FFB of the G29 steering wheel. Because FFB is absent, I won't be playing this game.
title: F1 2018

gpu: ATI Technologies Inc. AMD Radeon RX 460
notes: Not a sigle problem until i've installed the AMD GPU PRO driver. Doesn't lunch with MESA.
